description: The Caltagirone Mafia family is a Cosa Nostra crime family based in Caltagirone, Sicily, founded in 1982 by Francesco 'Ciccio' La Rocca. It engages in extortion, drug trafficking, and political manipulation. The family rose to prominence through alliances with the Catania Mafia and Corleonesi. Despite La Rocca's imprisonment and death in 2020, the family's influence persists.
